synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2025-21816 Moderate: Oracle Linux 10 delve and golang security update
description:
golang
[1.25.3-1]
- Update to Go 1.25.3

[1.25.1-1]
- Update to Go1.25.1 -Resolves: RHEL-116849

[1.25.0-5]
- Disable race for risv64

[1.25.0-4]
- Revert DWARF5 defaults

[1.25.0-3]
- Update CI support

[1.25.0-2]
- rpminspect.yaml: Add preprofile binary as it contains debugging symbols

[1.25.0-1]
- Update to Go 1.25.0
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2025-21816

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2025-21816.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 10 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
delve-1.25.2-1.0.1.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
go-toolset-1.25.3-1.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
golang-1.25.3-1.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
golang-bin-1.25.3-1.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
golang-docs-1.25.3-1.el10_1.noarch.rpm
golang-misc-1.25.3-1.el10_1.noarch.rpm
golang-race-1.25.3-1.el10_1.x86_64.rpm
golang-src-1.25.3-1.el10_1.noarch.rpm
golang-tests-1.25.3-1.el10_1.noarch.rpm

aarch64:
delve-1.25.2-1.0.1.el10_1.aarch64.rpm
go-toolset-1.25.3-1.el10_1.aarch64.rpm
golang-1.25.3-1.el10_1.aarch64.rpm
golang-bin-1.25.3-1.el10_1.aarch64.rpm
golang-docs-1.25.3-1.el10_1.noarch.rpm
golang-misc-1.25.3-1.el10_1.noarch.rpm
golang-race-1.25.3-1.el10_1.aarch64.rpm
golang-src-1.25.3-1.el10_1.noarch.rpm
golang-tests-1.25.3-1.el10_1.noarch.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol10/SRPMS-updates/delve-1.25.2-1.0.1.el10_1.src.rpm
http://oss.oracle.com/ol10/SRPMS-updates/golang-1.25.3-1.el10_1.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2025-58183




Description of changes:

golang
[1.25.3-1]
- Update to Go 1.25.3

[1.25.1-1]
- Update to Go1.25.1 -Resolves: RHEL-116849

[1.25.0-5]
- Disable race for risv64

[1.25.0-4]
- Revert DWARF5 defaults

[1.25.0-3]
- Update CI support

[1.25.0-2]
- rpminspect.yaml: Add preprofile binary as it contains debugging symbols

[1.25.0-1]
- Update to Go 1.25.0
